Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.profile

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    SimplifyTermProfile
    An extended JavaProfile used in side proofs to simplify a Term.
    SymbolicExecutionJavaProfile
    An extended JavaProfile used by the symbolic execution API.
    SymbolicExecutionJavaProfileDefaultProfileResolver
    A DefaultProfileResolver which returns SymbolicExecutionJavaProfile.getDefaultInstance().
